option.name: originalContent
updatedContent

updatedContent

updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">OnDevice AI</string> <string name="hint_prompt">Ask me anything…</string> <string name="btn_load_model">Load Model</string> <string name="btn_generate">Generate</string> <string name="btn_stop">Stop</string> <string name="default_output">AI response will appear here…</string> <string name="model_not_loaded">No model loaded</string> <string name="model_loaded">Model: %s</string> <string name="btn_select_model">Select Model</string> <string name="btn_models">Models</string> <string name="btn_clear_chat">Clear chat</string> <string name="status_timer">Time: %s</string> <string name="status_timer_default">0.0s</string> <string name="status_ram">RAM: %s</string> <string name="status_ram_default">RAM: --</string> <string name="status_cpu">CPU: %s</string> <string name="status_cpu_default">CPU: --</string> <string name="status_gpu">GPU: %s</string> <string name="log_header">AI Log</string> <string name="app_subtitle">On-Device Language Model</string> <string name="content_desc_ai">AI Assistant</string> <string name="content_desc_timer">Timer</string> <string name="content_desc_ram">RAM Usage</string> <string name="content_desc_cpu">CPU Usage</string> <string name="content_desc_log">Log Terminal</string> <string name="content_desc_chat">Chat</string> <string name="content_desc_model">Model</string> <string name="chat_cleared">Chat history cleared</string> <string name="confirm_clear_chat">Clear all chat history?</string> <string name="yes">Yes</string> <string name="no">No</string>
<!-- Chat History --> <string name="chat_history_title">Chat History</string> <string name="btn_chat_history">History</string> <string name="btn_back">Back</string> <string name="btn_clear_all">Clear All</string> <string name="btn_delete_session">Delete chat</string> <string name="btn_new_chat">New Chat</string> <string name="no_chat_history">No chat history</string> <string name="no_chat_history_desc">Your conversations will appear here</string> <string name="confirm_delete_session">Delete this conversation?</string> <string name="confirm_clear_all_history">Delete all chat history? This cannot be undone.</string> <string name="session_deleted">Conversation deleted</string> <string name="all_history_deleted">All history deleted</string>
<!-- Models --> <string name="models_title">Models</string> <string name="tab_downloaded">Downloaded</string> <string name="tab_available">Available</string> <string name="no_models_downloaded">No models downloaded</string> <string name="no_models_downloaded_desc">Download a model from the Available tab to get started</string> <string name="btn_download">Download</string> <string name="downloading_model">Downloading model…</string> <string name="download_complete">Download complete</string> <string name="download_failed">Download failed</string> <string name="already_downloaded">Downloaded</string> <string name="selected">Selected</string> <string name="confirm_download">Download this model?</string> <string name="model_size">Size: %s</string> <string name="model_already_exists">Model already downloaded</string> <string name="btn_delete_model">Delete model</string> <string name="confirm_delete_model">Delete this model?</string> <string name="confirm_delete_model_desc">This will permanently delete the model file from your device.</string> <string name="model_deleted">Model deleted</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">OnDevice AI</string> <string name="hint_prompt">Ask me anything…</string> <string name="btn_load_model">Load Model</string> <string name="btn_generate">Generate</string> <string name="btn_stop">Stop</string> <string name="default_output">AI response will appear here…</string> <string name="model_not_loaded">No model loaded</string> <string name="model_loaded">Model: %s</string> <string name="btn_select_model">Select Model</string> <string name="btn_models">Models</string> <string name="btn_clear_chat">Clear chat</string> <string name="status_timer">Time: %s</string> <string name="status_timer_default">0.0s</string> <string name="status_ram">RAM: %s</string> <string name="status_ram_default">RAM: --</string> <string name="status_cpu">CPU: %s</string> <string name="status_cpu_default">CPU: --</string> <string name="status_gpu">GPU: %s</string> <string name="log_header">AI Log</string> <string name="app_subtitle">On-Device Language Model</string> <string name="content_desc_ai">AI Assistant</string> <string name="content_desc_timer">Timer</string> <string name="content_desc_ram">RAM Usage</string> <string name="content_desc_cpu">CPU Usage</string> <string name="content_desc_log">Log Terminal</string> <string name="content_desc_chat">Chat</string> <string name="content_desc_model">Model</string> <string name="chat_cleared">Chat history cleared</string> <string name="confirm_clear_chat">Clear all chat history?</string> <string name="yes">Yes</string> <string name="no">No</string>
<!-- Chat History --> <string name="chat_history_title">Chat History</string> <string name="btn_chat_history">History</string> <string name="btn_back">Back</string> <string name="btn_clear_all">Clear All</string> <string name="btn_delete_session">Delete chat</string> <string name="btn_new_chat">New Chat</string> <string name="reset_in_progress">Resetting session…</string> <string name="reset_success">Session reset</string> <string name="reset_failed">Session reset failed</string> <string name="no_chat_history">No chat history</string> <string name="no_chat_history_desc">Your conversations will appear here</string> <string name="confirm_delete_session">Delete this conversation?</string> <string name="confirm_clear_all_history">Delete all chat history? This cannot be undone.</string> <string name="session_deleted">Conversation deleted</string> <string name="all_history_deleted">All history deleted</string>
<!-- Models --> <string name="models_title">Models</string> <string name="tab_downloaded">Downloaded</string> <string name="tab_available">Available</string> <string name="no_models_downloaded">No models downloaded</string> <string name="no_models_downloaded_desc">Download a model from the Available tab to get started</string> <string name="btn_download">Download</string> <string name="downloading_model">Downloading model…</string> <string name="download_complete">Download complete</string> <string name="download_failed">Download failed</string> <string name="already_downloaded">Downloaded</string> <string name="selected">Selected</string> <string name="confirm_download">Download this model?</string> <string name="model_size">Size: %s</string> <string name="model_already_exists">Model already downloaded</string> <string name="btn_delete_model">Delete model</string> <string name="confirm_delete_model">Delete this model?</string> <string name="confirm_delete_model_desc">This will permanently delete the model file from your device.</string> <string name="model_deleted">Model deleted</string> </resources>
